Labels.WelcomeToUseBL:
Welcome to use Bloret Minecraft Launcher.
If you find any bugs or have suggestions, please submit an issue on GitHub.
You are also welcome to submit a pull request on GitHub to contribute to Bloret Launcher.

Labels.CaptionLabel_12:
Using IPv6 for multiplayer allows you to play with others without opening Bloret Launcher.
IPv6 is a free service provided by your ISP, with no extra charge. Users who already have it can click the button above to use directly.
IPv6 multiplayer may be unstable. If you require stability, we recommend using the Online Client below.
Labels.CaptionLabel_9:
Easytier is an open-source project that provides efficient multiplayer services.
Enable multiplayer service here; the other player must have Bloret Launcher open to join you.
Labels.Client_Statue_Show: You are not connected to the Easytier network

buttons.ClientOnlineClient: Connect to the other player's network

Labels.CaptionLabel_12: One-click download and install vanilla Minecraft

Labels.StrongBodyLabel: Let Luoke help you pick the right mods
Labels.CaptionLabel: No need to search for mods one by one—let Bloriko find them for you.
Labels.Bloriko_Important_Info: Bloriko relies on AI. Bloriko may make mistakes—please verify important information.

Labels.CaptionLabel_2: © 2025 Bloret Launcher All rights reserved. © 2025 Bloret All rights reserved.

Labels.Sync_From_BloretPassPort_Card: Using Bloret PassPort grants access to nearly all Bloret services.
Labels.go_Minecraft_Account_To_Bloret_PassPort_: Manage your account via Bloret PassPort
Easily log in to your Minecraft account and perform operations conveniently.

buttons.ManageMinecraftAccountOnBloretPassPortWe: Manage your account on Bloret PassPort

Labels.CaptionLabel_15: Conveniently capture screen content, including the Minecraft window
Labels.label_2: Query result will be displayed here
Labels.search_name: Query result will be displayed here

LineEdit.skin_uuid: Player UUID — note: not the name. If you don’t have it, please obtain it above.

Labels.CaptionLabel_13: The folder storing all Minecraft data, resources, and versions
Labels.CaptionLabel_12:
Maximum number of files allowed to download simultaneously.
A higher number means faster download speed but consumes more system resources.
Labels.CaptionLabel_5: Default window size on startup (requires restart to take effect)
Labels.CaptionLabel_15: The folder storing all Bloret Launcher logs
Labels.CaptionLabel_11: Automatically start Bloret Launcher on system boot and minimise to system tray
Labels.CaptionLabel_6: Prevent Bloret Launcher from overloading your computer
Labels.CaptionLabel_7: Show notifications of what the software is doing before it opens
Labels.StrongBodyLabel_21: Show Minecraft Login Method on Home
Labels.CaptionLabel_10: Display whether you're using Microsoft or offline login
Labels.CaptionLabel_8: Disable certain internet connections and disallow PCFS services.
Labels.CaptionLabel_9: Most settings require a restart to take effect.

texts.你还未安装任何版本哦，请前往下载页面安装: You haven't installed any versions yet. Please go to the download page to install.
texts.您当前尚未登录: You are not currently logged in
texts.Bloret Launcher 已阻止了重复打开软件的操作: Bloret Launcher has blocked the operation of opening the software repeatedly
texts.为了防止 Bloret Launcher 占满您的计算机，我们已阻止您重复打开:
To prevent Bloret Launcher from overloading your computer, we have blocked you from opening it multiple times.
If you need to allow multiple instances, please enable it in Settings.
texts.警告：SystemTrayIcon 的 parent 参数为 None: Warning: SystemTrayIcon's parent parameter is None
texts.重复运行被禁用：检测到程序已运行，退出新实例: Multiple instances disabled: detected running instance, exiting new one
texts.下载完成，但版本信息缺失: Download completed, but version information is missing
texts.托盘菜单启动，不显示 TeachingTip: Launched from tray menu, not showing TeachingTip
texts.无法获取 Minecraft 版本列表: Failed to fetch Minecraft version list
texts.正在执行微软登录命令：cmcl account --login=microsof: Executing Microsoft login command: cmcl account --login=microsoft
texts.本地模式已启用，无法使用微软登录。: Local mode is enabled; Microsoft login is unavailable.
texts.Bloret Launcher 在本地模式下无法进行微软登录，\\n因为该操作需:
Bloret Launcher cannot perform Microsoft login in local mode
because it requires internet access.
To log in, please disable local mode in Settings, or use offline login.
texts.加载或显示下载弹窗时发生错误:: Error occurred while loading or displaying download popup:
texts.无法显示下载进度弹窗:: Unable to display download progress popup:
Download may take a few minutes. Please be patient...
texts.已经开始下载...下载状态将会显示在这里: Download has started... status will appear here
texts.该名称已存在，请更换一个名称。: This name already exists. Please choose another.
texts.该版本已下载过。: This version has already been downloaded.
texts.名称包含非法字符或中文，请遵循以下规则：\\n1. 不能包含 \\\\ / ::
Name contains invalid characters or Chinese. Please follow these rules:
1. Cannot contain \ / : * ? " < > |
2. Cannot contain Chinese
3. Cannot use system-reserved names
texts.无法解析Java版本号: Unable to parse Java version number
texts.下载失败，请查看日志了解详情: download failed. Please check logs for details
texts.已成功下载\\n前往主页就可以启动了！: successfully downloaded\nGo to Home to launch it!
texts.无法获取版本列表，可能是你还未安装任何版本，请前往下载页面安装: Unable to fetch version list. You may not have installed any versions yet. Please go to the download page to install.
texts.正在处理 Minecraft 文件和启动...\\n您马上就能见到 Minecr: Processing Minecraft files and launching...\nYou’ll see the Minecraft window shortly!
texts.为了防止 Bloret Launcher 占满您的计算机，我们已阻止您重复打开: To prevent Bloret Launcher from overloading your computer, we have blocked you from opening it multiple times.\nIf you need to allow multiple instances, please enable it in Settings.
texts.cmcl.json 中的 accounts 列表为空: The accounts list in cmcl.json is empty
texts.检查账户信息时发生错误: Error occurred while checking account information
texts.Minecraft 还不知道您是谁，无法启动。请先登录，确认以转到通行证页面。: Minecraft doesn't know who you are and cannot start. Please log in first. Confirm to go to Passport page.
texts.路径或显示名称不能为空: Path or display name cannot be empty
texts.指定的路径不存在，请重新选择: The specified path does not exist. Please reselect.
texts.指定的路径不是文件，请重新选择: The specified path is not a file. Please reselect.
texts.无法连接到服务器，请检查网络连接或稍后再试。: Unable to connect to server. Please check your network connection or try again later.
texts.名称包含非法字符或中文，请遵循以下规则：\\n1. 不能包含 \\\\ / :: Name contains invalid characters. Please follow these rules:\n1. Cannot contain \\ / : * ? \
Please complete login as prompted in your browser...
texts.请填写值后设定: Please enter a value before setting
texts.Minecraft 已结束\\n如果您认为是异常退出，请查看 log 文件夹中的: Minecraft has closed\nIf you believe this was an abnormal exit, please check the latest log file in the log folder\nand contact us via this project’s GitHub or Bloret QQ group.
texts.本地模式已启用，获取 Light-Minecraft-Download-Way: Local mode is enabled; fetching Light-Minecraft-Download-Way has been skipped.
texts.Bloret Launcher 需要在安装文件夹写入文件，但是我们在多次尝试后仍:
Bloret Launcher needs to write files in the installation folder, but failed after multiple attempts.
This may be because the folder is read-only.
Please consider installing Bloret Launcher outside of Program Files or Program Files (x86).
Due to lack of write permission, Bloret Launcher will exit.
texts..minecraft 文件夹不存在，开始下载 Minecraft 核心: .minecraft folder does not exist; starting download of Minecraft core
texts.下载 Minecraft 核心失败，请检查日志。: Failed to download Minecraft core. Please check logs.
texts.本地模式已启用，无法进行 Bloret 通行证登录。: Local mode is enabled; Bloret PassPort login is unavailable.
texts.Bloret Launcher 在本地模式下无法登录 Bloret 通行证，\\: Bloret Launcher cannot log in to Bloret PassPort in local mode\nbecause it requires internet access.\nTo log in, please disable local mode in Settings.
MSI installation detected; attempting to locate Java path...
texts.未找到 JAVA_HOME 环境变量，尝试在常见路径查找。: JAVA_HOME environment variable not found; searching common paths.
texts.警告: 无法自动确定 MSI 安装的 Java 路径，可能需要手动配置。: Warning: Unable to automatically determine Java path for MSI installation. Manual configuration may be required.
texts.警告: 未能确定 Java 路径，配置文件未更新 Java_Path。: Warning: Failed to determine Java path; Java_Path in config file not updated.
texts.无法读取注册表键值: Unable to read registry key value
texts.打开该项目的 Github 页面: Open GitHub page for this project
texts.警告：所选版本可能不兼容此模组: Warning: selected version may be incompatible with this mod
texts.无档案(请到通行证页面登录): No profile (please log in on Passport page)
texts.本地模式已启用，获取 Minecraft 版本 的过程已跳过。: Local mode enabled; fetching Minecraft versions skipped.
texts.未找到可用的IPv6地址，IPv6功能将被禁用: No available IPv6 address found; IPv6 feature will be disabled

texts.请输入有效的端口号: Please enter a valid port number
texts.按下确认键复制到剪贴板，然后发给好友，在 Minecraft 客户端中添加服务器: Press confirm to copy to clipboard, then send to your friend. Add the server in Minecraft client and join.
texts.未找到OnlineClient_ClientTime标签，无法更新连接时长显示: OnlineClient_ClientTime label not found; cannot update connection duration display
texts.IPV6地址和端口已复制到剪贴板: IPv6 address and port copied to clipboard
texts.如需找回，可前往系统回收站找回。: To recover, check your system Recycle Bin.
texts.新名称与原名称相同，无需更改: New name is identical to the original; no change needed
texts.尝试修改的项目不存在于自定义列表中: Item to modify does not exist in custom list
texts.版本信息中未找到客户端下载链接: Client download URL not found in version info
texts.获取远程端口或连接地址失败: Failed to obtain remote port or connection address
texts.frpc 客户端已在后台运行: frpc client is already running in background
Permission error: System security software (e.g., Windows Defender) may have blocked frpc.exe. Please add frpc.exe to your antivirus whitelist or exclusion list.
texts.安全软件阻止：frpc.exe被安全软件识别为潜在威胁。请将该文件添加到杀毒软件: Security software blocked: frpc.exe was flagged as a potential threat. Please add it to your antivirus whitelist or exclusion list.
texts.无法获取 Bloret 版本列表: Unable to fetch Bloret version list

texts.当前版本不是最新版: Current version is not the latest
texts.本地模式已启用，检查更新 的过程已跳过。: Local mode enabled; update check skipped.
texts.是否将本地 Minecraft 账户同步到Bloret Passport？: Sync local Minecraft account to Bloret PassPort?
texts.同步到云端后，您可以在其他设备上登录 Bloret PassPort，然后快速恢: After syncing to the cloud, you can log into Bloret PassPort on other devices and quickly restore your Minecraft account.
texts.同步 Minecraft 账户到 Bloret Passport失败: Failed to sync Minecraft account to Bloret PassPort
texts.已成功将本地 Minecraft 账户同步到 Bloret Passport: Successfully synced local Minecraft account to Bloret PassPort
texts.是否将 Bloret Passport 账户同步到本地 Minecraft 账户: Sync Bloret PassPort account to local Minecraft account?
texts.确定要从 Bloret Passport 同步 Minecraft 账户 到本地: Are you sure you want to sync Minecraft account from Bloret PassPort to local? This will overwrite local account data.
texts.从 Bloret Passport 获取 Minecraft 账户失败: Failed to fetch Minecraft account from Bloret PassPort
texts.已成功从 Bloret Passport 同步 Minecraft 账户到本地: Successfully synced Minecraft account from Bloret PassPort to local
texts.界面上可能不会及时刷新，但已经登录。: The UI may not refresh immediately, but login has succeeded.
